name: Fresh Spinach Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 quarts of water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Blanch washed spinach for one minute, then let drain in a colander. Stir 1/2 tsp salt and 2 tbsp olive oil into the water.
3. Carefully add each sheet of pasta to the boiling water and cook for 10-12 minutes. Rinse pasta in cold water and lay each sheet flat on a cutting board or counter covered with plastic wrap or wax paper.
4. Saute green onions in 2 tbsp olive oil for 1 minute.
5. Chop spinach and add it to the sauteed onions. Combine with all remaining ingredients and set aside.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly oil a baking dish and spread one-third of the sauce over the bottom.
7. Layer several strips of pasta on top, covering the bottom and hanging over the sides of the baking dish.
8. Cover with half of the spinach filling, then add another layer of pasta. Continue adding pasta, sauce, and filling, ending with pasta and covering with sauce.
9. Sprinkle nutritional yeast (parmesan) or chopped fresh basil leaves on top if desired.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 20 minutes. Remove foil and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Let the lasagna rest for 15 minutes before cutting and serving. Serves 8.
